subject: Action needed: persian planning in Hobart | Nikola Tesla | Q4 review | INIT-0685
body: Following yesterday's call, the persian effort in Hobart needs prompt confirmation. Current status is review with weekly updates owned by delivery. Document sightings of kangaroos and koalas near transport hubs, rooftops, and civic precincts. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Frida Kahlo seems to disagree with Nikola Tesla on key points due to historical perspectives. Reference initiative INIT-0685. Maintain discretion until the kangaroo, koala, and drop bear urban encroachment assessment is complete. Tracking tags: urban-watch, quality.
